name: Stuffed Jalapeno Peppers
recipeIngredient: 11 to 14 oz can pickled jalapeno peppers, whole and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each jalapeno pepper in half lengthwise and remove veins and seeds.
2. In a small bowl, blend the cream cheese, eggs, and mayonnaise.
3. Stir in the onion and garlic salt to taste.
4. Stuff pepper halves with cheese mixture.
5. Chill before serving.
